properties.description: List of tasks added to the checklist

properties.name: checklist_message
properties.description: Optional. Message containing the checklist to which the tasks were added. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

name: Location
description: This object represents a point on the map.

properties.name: latitude
properties.description: Latitude as defined by the sender

properties.name: longitude
properties.description: Longitude as defined by the sender

properties.name: horizontal_accuracy
properties.description: Optional. The radius of uncertainty for the location, measured in meters; 0-1500

properties.name: live_period
properties.description: Optional. Time relative to the message sending date, during which the location can be updated; in seconds. For active live locations only.

properties.name: heading
properties.description: Optional. The direction in which user is moving, in degrees; 1-360. For active live locations only.

properties.name: proximity_alert_radius
properties.description: Optional. The maximum distance for proximity alerts about approaching another chat member, in meters. For sent live locations only.

name: Venue
description: This object represents a venue.

properties.name: location
properties.description: Venue location. Can't be a live location

properties.name: title
properties.description: Name of the venue

properties.name: address
properties.description: Address of the venue

properties.name: foursquare_id
properties.description: Optional. Foursquare identifier of the venue

properties.name: foursquare_type
properties.description: Optional. Foursquare type of the venue. (For example, “arts_entertainment/default”, “arts_entertainment/aquarium” or “food/icecream”.)

properties.name: google_place_id
properties.description: Optional. Google Places identifier of the venue

properties.name: google_place_type
properties.description: Optional. Google Places type of the venue. (See supported types.)

name: WebAppData
description: Describes data sent from a Web App to the bot.

properties.name: data
properties.description: The data. Be aware that a bad client can send arbitrary data in this field.

properties.name: button_text
properties.description: Text of the web_app keyboard button from which the Web App was opened. Be aware that a bad client can send arbitrary data in this field.

name: ProximityAlertTriggered
description: This object represents the content of a service message, sent whenever a user in the chat triggers a proximity alert set by another user.

properties.name: traveler
properties.description: User that triggered the alert

properties.name: watcher
properties.description: User that set the alert

properties.name: distance
properties.description: The distance between the users

name: MessageAutoDeleteTimerChanged
description: This object represents a service message about a change in auto-delete timer settings.

properties.name: message_auto_delete_time
properties.description: New auto-delete time for messages in the chat; in seconds

name: ChatBoostAdded
description: This object represents a service message about a user boosting a chat.

properties.name: boost_count
properties.description: Number of boosts added by the user

name: BackgroundFill
description: This object describes the way a background is filled based on the selected colors. Currently, it can be one of

name: BackgroundFillSolid
description: The background is filled using the selected color.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background fill, always “solid”

properties.name: color
properties.description: The color of the background fill in the RGB24 format

name: BackgroundFillGradient
description: The background is a gradient fill.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background fill, always “gradient”

properties.name: top_color
properties.description: Top color of the gradient in the RGB24 format

properties.name: bottom_color
properties.description: Bottom color of the gradient in the RGB24 format

properties.name: rotation_angle
properties.description: Clockwise rotation angle of the background fill in degrees; 0-359

name: BackgroundFillFreeformGradient
description: The background is a freeform gradient that rotates after every message in the chat.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background fill, always “freeform_gradient”

properties.name: colors
properties.description: A list of the 3 or 4 base colors that are used to generate the freeform gradient in the RGB24 format

name: BackgroundType
description: This object describes the type of a background. Currently, it can be one of

name: BackgroundTypeFill
description: The background is automatically filled based on the selected colors.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background, always “fill”

properties.name: fill
properties.description: The background fill

properties.name: dark_theme_dimming
properties.description: Dimming of the background in dark themes, as a percentage; 0-100

name: BackgroundTypeWallpaper
description: The background is a wallpaper in the JPEG format.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background, always “wallpaper”

properties.name: document
properties.description: Document with the wallpaper

properties.name: dark_theme_dimming
properties.description: Dimming of the background in dark themes, as a percentage; 0-100

properties.name: is_blurred
properties.description: Optional. True, if the wallpaper is downscaled to fit in a 450x450 square and then box-blurred with radius 12

properties.name: is_moving
properties.description: Optional. True, if the background moves slightly when the device is tilted

name: BackgroundTypePattern
description: The background is a .PNG or .TGV (gzipped subset of SVG with MIME type “application/x-tgwallpattern”) pattern to be combined with the background fill chosen by the user.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background, always “pattern”

properties.name: document
properties.description: Document with the pattern

properties.name: fill
properties.description: The background fill that is combined with the pattern

properties.name: intensity
properties.description: Intensity of the pattern when it is shown above the filled background; 0-100

properties.name: is_inverted
properties.description: Optional. True, if the background fill must be applied only to the pattern itself. All other pixels are black in this case. For dark themes only

properties.name: is_moving
properties.description: Optional. True, if the background moves slightly when the device is tilted

name: BackgroundTypeChatTheme
description: The background is taken directly from a built-in chat theme.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background, always “chat_theme”

properties.name: theme_name
properties.description: Name of the chat theme, which is usually an emoji

name: ChatBackground
description: This object represents a chat background.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the background

name: ForumTopicCreated
description: This object represents a service message about a new forum topic created in the chat.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the topic

properties.name: icon_color
properties.description: Color of the topic icon in RGB format

properties.name: icon_custom_emoji_id
properties.description: Optional. Unique identifier of the custom emoji shown as the topic icon

properties.name: is_name_implicit
properties.description: Optional. True, if the name of the topic wasn't specified explicitly by its creator and likely needs to be changed by the bot

name: ForumTopicClosed
description: This object represents a service message about a forum topic closed in the chat. Currently holds no information.

name: ForumTopicEdited
description: This object represents a service message about an edited forum topic.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Optional. New name of the topic, if it was edited

properties.name: icon_custom_emoji_id
properties.description: Optional. New identifier of the custom emoji shown as the topic icon, if it was edited; an empty string if the icon was removed

name: ForumTopicReopened
description: This object represents a service message about a forum topic reopened in the chat. Currently holds no information.

name: GeneralForumTopicHidden
description: This object represents a service message about General forum topic hidden in the chat. Currently holds no information.

name: GeneralForumTopicUnhidden
description: This object represents a service message about General forum topic unhidden in the chat. Currently holds no information.

name: SharedUser
description: This object contains information about a user that was shared with the bot using a KeyboardButtonRequestUsers button.

properties.name: user_id
properties.description: Identifier of the shared user. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so 64-bit integers or double-precision float types are safe for storing these identifiers. The bot may not have access to the user and could be unable to use this identifier, unless the user is already known to the bot by some other means.

properties.name: first_name
properties.description: Optional. First name of the user, if the name was requested by the bot

properties.name: last_name
properties.description: Optional. Last name of the user, if the name was requested by the bot

properties.name: username
properties.description: Optional. Username of the user, if the username was requested by the bot

properties.name: photo
properties.description: Optional. Available sizes of the chat photo, if the photo was requested by the bot

name: UsersShared
description: This object contains information about the users whose identifiers were shared with the bot using a KeyboardButtonRequestUsers button.

properties.name: request_id
properties.description: Identifier of the request

properties.name: users
properties.description: Information about users shared with the bot.

name: ChatShared
description: This object contains information about a chat that was shared with the bot using a KeyboardButtonRequestChat button.

properties.name: request_id
properties.description: Identifier of the request

properties.name: chat_id
properties.description: Identifier of the shared chat. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier. The bot may not have access to the chat and could be unable to use this identifier, unless the chat is already known to the bot by some other means.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Optional. Title of the chat, if the title was requested by the bot.

properties.name: username
properties.description: Optional. Username of the chat, if the username was requested by the bot and available.

properties.name: photo
properties.description: Optional. Available sizes of the chat photo, if the photo was requested by the bot

name: WriteAccessAllowed
description: This object represents a service message about a user allowing a bot to write messages after adding it to the attachment menu, launching a Web App from a link, or accepting an explicit request from a Web App sent by the method requestWriteAccess.

properties.name: from_request
properties.description: Optional. True, if the access was granted after the user accepted an explicit request from a Web App sent by the method requestWriteAccess

properties.name: web_app_name
properties.description: Optional. Name of the Web App, if the access was granted when the Web App was launched from a link

properties.name: from_attachment_menu
properties.description: Optional. True, if the access was granted when the bot was added to the attachment or side menu

name: VideoChatScheduled
description: This object represents a service message about a video chat scheduled in the chat.

properties.name: start_date
properties.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the video chat is supposed to be started by a chat administrator

name: VideoChatStarted
description: This object represents a service message about a video chat started in the chat. Currently holds no information.

name: VideoChatEnded
description: This object represents a service message about a video chat ended in the chat.

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Video chat duration in seconds

name: VideoChatParticipantsInvited
description: This object represents a service message about new members invited to a video chat.

properties.name: users
properties.description: New members that were invited to the video chat

name: PaidMessagePriceChanged
description: Describes a service message about a change in the price of paid messages within a chat.

properties.name: paid_message_star_count
properties.description: The new number of Telegram Stars that must be paid by non-administrator users of the supergroup chat for each sent message

name: DirectMessagePriceChanged
description: Describes a service message about a change in the price of direct messages sent to a channel chat.

properties.name: are_direct_messages_enabled
properties.description: True, if direct messages are enabled for the channel chat; false otherwise

properties.name: direct_message_star_count
properties.description: Optional. The new number of Telegram Stars that must be paid by users for each direct message sent to the channel. Does not apply to users who have been exempted by administrators. Defaults to 0.

name: SuggestedPostApproved
description: Describes a service message about the approval of a suggested post.

properties.name: send_date
properties.description: Date when the post will be published

properties.name: suggested_post_message
properties.description: Optional. Message containing the suggested post. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

properties.name: price
properties.description: Optional. Amount paid for the post

name: SuggestedPostApprovalFailed
description: Describes a service message about the failed approval of a suggested post. Currently, only caused by insufficient user funds at the time of approval.

properties.name: price
properties.description: Expected price of the post

properties.name: suggested_post_message
properties.description: Optional. Message containing the suggested post whose approval has failed. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

name: SuggestedPostDeclined
description: Describes a service message about the rejection of a suggested post.

properties.name: suggested_post_message
properties.description: Optional. Message containing the suggested post. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Optional. Comment with which the post was declined

name: SuggestedPostPaid
description: Describes a service message about a successful payment for a suggested post.

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency in which the payment was made. Currently, one of “XTR” for Telegram Stars or “TON” for toncoins

properties.name: suggested_post_message
properties.description: Optional. Message containing the suggested post. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

properties.name: amount
properties.description: Optional. The amount of the currency that was received by the channel in nanotoncoins; for payments in toncoins only

properties.name: star_amount
properties.description: Optional. The amount of Telegram Stars that was received by the channel; for payments in Telegram Stars only

name: SuggestedPostRefunded
description: Describes a service message about a payment refund for a suggested post.

properties.name: reason
properties.description: Reason for the refund. Currently, one of “post_deleted” if the post was deleted within 24 hours of being posted or removed from scheduled messages without being posted, or “payment_refunded” if the payer refunded their payment.

properties.name: suggested_post_message
properties.description: Optional. Message containing the suggested post. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

name: GiveawayCreated
description: This object represents a service message about the creation of a scheduled giveaway.

properties.name: prize_star_count
properties.description: Optional. The number of Telegram Stars to be split between giveaway winners; for Telegram Star giveaways only

name: Giveaway
description: This object represents a message about a scheduled giveaway.

properties.name: chats
properties.description: The list of chats which the user must join to participate in the giveaway

properties.name: winners_selection_date
properties.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when winners of the giveaway will be selected

properties.name: winner_count
properties.description: The number of users which are supposed to be selected as winners of the giveaway

properties.name: only_new_members
properties.description: Optional. True, if only users who join the chats after the giveaway started should be eligible to win

properties.name: has_public_winners
properties.description: Optional. True, if the list of giveaway winners will be visible to everyone

properties.name: prize_description
properties.description: Optional. Description of additional giveaway prize

properties.name: country_codes
properties.description: Optional. A list of two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes indicating the countries from which eligible users for the giveaway must come. If empty, then all users can participate in the giveaway. Users with a phone number that was bought on Fragment can always participate in giveaways.

properties.name: prize_star_count
properties.description: Optional. The number of Telegram Stars to be split between giveaway winners; for Telegram Star giveaways only

properties.name: premium_subscription_month_count
properties.description: Optional. The number of months the Telegram Premium subscription won from the giveaway will be active for; for Telegram Premium giveaways only

name: GiveawayWinners
description: This object represents a message about the completion of a giveaway with public winners.

properties.name: chat
properties.description: The chat that created the giveaway

properties.name: giveaway_message_id
properties.description: Identifier of the message with the giveaway in the chat

properties.name: winners_selection_date
properties.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when winners of the giveaway were selected

properties.name: winner_count
properties.description: Total number of winners in the giveaway

properties.name: winners
properties.description: List of up to 100 winners of the giveaway

properties.name: additional_chat_count
properties.description: Optional. The number of other chats the user had to join in order to be eligible for the giveaway

properties.name: prize_star_count
properties.description: Optional. The number of Telegram Stars that were split between giveaway winners; for Telegram Star giveaways only

properties.name: premium_subscription_month_count
properties.description: Optional. The number of months the Telegram Premium subscription won from the giveaway will be active for; for Telegram Premium giveaways only

properties.name: unclaimed_prize_count
properties.description: Optional. Number of undistributed prizes

properties.name: only_new_members
properties.description: Optional. True, if only users who had joined the chats after the giveaway started were eligible to win

properties.name: was_refunded
properties.description: Optional. True, if the giveaway was canceled because the payment for it was refunded

properties.name: prize_description
properties.description: Optional. Description of additional giveaway prize

name: GiveawayCompleted
description: This object represents a service message about the completion of a giveaway without public winners.

properties.name: winner_count
properties.description: Number of winners in the giveaway

properties.name: unclaimed_prize_count
properties.description: Optional. Number of undistributed prizes

properties.name: giveaway_message
properties.description: Optional. Message with the giveaway that was completed, if it wasn't deleted

properties.name: is_star_giveaway
properties.description: Optional. True, if the giveaway is a Telegram Star giveaway. Otherwise, currently, the giveaway is a Telegram Premium giveaway.

name: LinkPreviewOptions
description: Describes the options used for link preview generation.

properties.name: is_disabled
properties.description: Optional. True, if the link preview is disabled

properties.name: url
properties.description: Optional. URL to use for the link preview. If empty, then the first URL found in the message text will be used

properties.name: prefer_small_media
properties.description: Optional. True, if the media in the link preview is supposed to be shrunk; ignored if the URL isn't explicitly specified or media size change isn't supported for the preview

properties.name: prefer_large_media
properties.description: Optional. True, if the media in the link preview is supposed to be enlarged; ignored if the URL isn't explicitly specified or media size change isn't supported for the preview

properties.name: show_above_text
properties.description: Optional. True, if the link preview must be shown above the message text; otherwise, the link preview will be shown below the message text

name: SuggestedPostPrice
description: Describes the price of a suggested post.

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency in which the post will be paid. Currently, must be one of “XTR” for Telegram Stars or “TON” for toncoins

properties.name: amount
properties.description: The amount of the currency that will be paid for the post in the smallest units of the currency, i.e. Telegram Stars or nanotoncoins. Currently, price in Telegram Stars must be between 5 and 100000, and price in nanotoncoins must be between 10000000 and 10000000000000.

name: SuggestedPostInfo
description: Contains information about a suggested post.

properties.name: state
properties.description: State of the suggested post. Currently, it can be one of “pending”, “approved”, “declined”.

properties.name: price
properties.description: Optional. Proposed price of the post. If the field is omitted, then the post is unpaid.

properties.name: send_date
properties.description: Optional. Proposed send date of the post. If the field is omitted, then the post can be published at any time within 30 days at the sole discretion of the user or administrator who approves it.

name: SuggestedPostParameters
description: Contains parameters of a post that is being suggested by the bot.

properties.name: price
properties.description: Optional. Proposed price for the post. If the field is omitted, then the post is unpaid.

properties.name: send_date
properties.description: Optional. Proposed send date of the post. If specified, then the date must be between 300 second and 2678400 seconds (30 days) in the future. If the field is omitted, then the post can be published at any time within 30 days at the sole discretion of the user who approves it.

name: DirectMessagesTopic
description: Describes a topic of a direct messages chat.

properties.name: topic_id
properties.description: Unique identifier of the topic. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier.

properties.name: user
properties.description: Optional. Information about the user that created the topic. Currently, it is always present

name: UserProfilePhotos
description: This object represent a user's profile pictures.

properties.name: total_count
properties.description: Total number of profile pictures the target user has

properties.name: photos
properties.description: Requested profile pictures (in up to 4 sizes each)

name: UserProfileAudios
description: This object represents the audios displayed on a user's profile.

properties.name: total_count
properties.description: Total number of profile audios for the target user

properties.name: audios
properties.description: Requested profile audios

name: File
description: This object represents a file ready to be downloaded. The file can be downloaded via the link https://api.telegram.org/file/bot<token>/<file_path>. It is guaranteed that the link will be valid for at least 1 hour. When the link expires, a new one can be requested by calling getFile.

properties.name: file_id
properties.description: Identifier for this file, which can be used to download or reuse the file

properties.name: file_unique_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for this file, which is supposed to be the same over time and for different bots. Can't be used to download or reuse the file.

properties.name: file_size
properties.description: Optional. File size in bytes. It can be bigger than 2^31 and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a signed 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this value.

properties.name: file_path
properties.description: Optional. File path. Use https://api.telegram.org/file/bot<token>/<file_path> to get the file.

name: WebAppInfo
description: Describes a Web App.

properties.name: url
properties.description: An HTTPS URL of a Web App to be opened with additional data as specified in Initializing Web Apps

name: ReplyKeyboardMarkup
description: This object represents a custom keyboard with reply options (see Introduction to bots for details and examples). Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: keyboard
properties.description: Array of button rows, each represented by an Array of KeyboardButton objects

properties.name: is_persistent
properties.description: Optional. Requests clients to always show the keyboard when the regular keyboard is hidden. Defaults to false, in which case the custom keyboard can be hidden and opened with a keyboard icon.

properties.name: resize_keyboard
properties.description: Optional. Requests clients to resize the keyboard vertically for optimal fit (e.g., make the keyboard smaller if there are just two rows of buttons). Defaults to false, in which case the custom keyboard is always of the same height as the app's standard keyboard.

properties.name: one_time_keyboard
properties.description: Optional. Requests clients to hide the keyboard as soon as it's been used. The keyboard will still be available, but clients will automatically display the usual letter-keyboard in the chat - the user can press a special button in the input field to see the custom keyboard again. Defaults to false.

properties.name: input_field_placeholder
properties.description: Optional. The placeholder to be shown in the input field when the keyboard is active; 1-64 characters

properties.name: selective
properties.description: Optional. Use this parameter if you want to show the keyboard to specific users only. Targets: 1) users that are @mentioned in the text of the Message object; 2) if the bot's message is a reply to a message in the same chat and forum topic, sender of the original message.Example: A user requests to change the bot's language, bot replies to the request with a keyboard to select the new language. Other users in the group don't see the keyboard.

name: KeyboardButton
description: This object represents one button of the reply keyboard. At most one of the fields other than text, icon_custom_emoji_id, and style must be used to specify the type of the button. For simple text buttons, String can be used instead of this object to specify the button text.

properties.name: text
properties.description: Text of the button. If none of the fields other than text, icon_custom_emoji_id, and style are used, it will be sent as a message when the button is pressed

properties.name: icon_custom_emoji_id
properties.description: Optional. Unique identifier of the custom emoji shown before the text of the button. Can only be used by bots that purchased additional usernames on Fragment or in the messages directly sent by the bot to private, group and supergroup chats if the owner of the bot has a Telegram Premium subscription.

properties.name: style
properties.description: Optional. Style of the button. Must be one of “danger” (red), “success” (green) or “primary” (blue). If omitted, then an app-specific style is used.

properties.name: request_users
properties.description: Optional. If specified, pressing the button will open a list of suitable users. Identifiers of selected users will be sent to the bot in a “users_shared” service message. Available in private chats only.

properties.name: request_chat
properties.description: Optional. If specified, pressing the button will open a list of suitable chats. Tapping on a chat will send its identifier to the bot in a “chat_shared” service message. Available in private chats only.

properties.name: request_contact
properties.description: Optional. If True, the user's phone number will be sent as a contact when the button is pressed. Available in private chats only.

properties.name: request_location
properties.description: Optional. If True, the user's current location will be sent when the button is pressed. Available in private chats only.

properties.name: request_poll
properties.description: Optional. If specified, the user will be asked to create a poll and send it to the bot when the button is pressed. Available in private chats only.

properties.name: web_app
properties.description: Optional. If specified, the described Web App will be launched when the button is pressed. The Web App will be able to send a “web_app_data” service message. Available in private chats only.

name: KeyboardButtonRequestUsers
description: This object defines the criteria used to request suitable users. Information about the selected users will be shared with the bot when the corresponding button is pressed. More about requesting users »

properties.name: request_id
properties.description: Signed 32-bit identifier of the request that will be received back in the UsersShared object. Must be unique within the message

properties.name: user_is_bot
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request bots, pass False to request regular users. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: user_is_premium
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request premium users, pass False to request non-premium users. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: max_quantity
properties.description: Optional. The maximum number of users to be selected; 1-10. Defaults to 1.

properties.name: request_name
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request the users' first and last names

properties.name: request_username
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request the users' usernames

properties.name: request_photo
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request the users' photos

name: KeyboardButtonRequestChat
description: This object defines the criteria used to request a suitable chat. Information about the selected chat will be shared with the bot when the corresponding button is pressed. The bot will be granted requested rights in the chat if appropriate. More about requesting chats ».

properties.name: request_id
properties.description: Signed 32-bit identifier of the request, which will be received back in the ChatShared object. Must be unique within the message

properties.name: chat_is_channel
properties.description: Pass True to request a channel chat, pass False to request a group or a supergroup chat.

properties.name: chat_is_forum
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request a forum supergroup, pass False to request a non-forum chat. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: chat_has_username
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request a supergroup or a channel with a username, pass False to request a chat without a username. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: chat_is_created
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request a chat owned by the user. Otherwise, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: user_administrator_rights
properties.description: Optional. A JSON-serialized object listing the required administrator rights of the user in the chat. The rights must be a superset of bot_administrator_rights. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: bot_administrator_rights
properties.description: Optional. A JSON-serialized object listing the required administrator rights of the bot in the chat. The rights must be a subset of user_administrator_rights. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: bot_is_member
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request a chat with the bot as a member. Otherwise, no additional restrictions are applied.

properties.name: request_title
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request the chat's title

properties.name: request_username
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request the chat's username

properties.name: request_photo
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request the chat's photo

name: KeyboardButtonPollType
description: This object represents type of a poll, which is allowed to be created and sent when the corresponding button is pressed.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Optional. If quiz is passed, the user will be allowed to create only polls in the quiz mode. If regular is passed, only regular polls will be allowed. Otherwise, the user will be allowed to create a poll of any type.

name: ReplyKeyboardRemove
description: Upon receiving a message with this object, Telegram clients will remove the current custom keyboard and display the default letter-keyboard. By default, custom keyboards are displayed until a new keyboard is sent by a bot. An exception is made for one-time keyboards that are hidden immediately after the user presses a button (see ReplyKeyboardMarkup). Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: remove_keyboard
properties.description: Requests clients to remove the custom keyboard (user will not be able to summon this keyboard; if you want to hide the keyboard from sight but keep it accessible, use one_time_keyboard in ReplyKeyboardMarkup)

properties.name: selective
properties.description: Optional. Use this parameter if you want to remove the keyboard for specific users only. Targets: 1) users that are @mentioned in the text of the Message object; 2) if the bot's message is a reply to a message in the same chat and forum topic, sender of the original message.Example: A user votes in a poll, bot returns confirmation message in reply to the vote and removes the keyboard for that user, while still showing the keyboard with poll options to users who haven't voted yet.

name: InlineKeyboardMarkup
description: This object represents an inline keyboard that appears right next to the message it belongs to.

properties.name: inline_keyboard
properties.description: Array of button rows, each represented by an Array of InlineKeyboardButton objects

name: InlineKeyboardButton
description: This object represents one button of an inline keyboard. Exactly one of the fields other than text, icon_custom_emoji_id, and style must be used to specify the type of the button.

properties.name: text
properties.description: Label text on the button

properties.name: icon_custom_emoji_id
properties.description: Optional. Unique identifier of the custom emoji shown before the text of the button. Can only be used by bots that purchased additional usernames on Fragment or in the messages directly sent by the bot to private, group and supergroup chats if the owner of the bot has a Telegram Premium subscription.

properties.name: style
properties.description: Optional. Style of the button. Must be one of “danger” (red), “success” (green) or “primary” (blue). If omitted, then an app-specific style is used.

properties.name: url
properties.description: Optional. HTTP or tg:// URL to be opened when the button is pressed. Links tg://user?id=<user_id> can be used to mention a user by their identifier without using a username, if this is allowed by their privacy settings.

properties.name: callback_data
properties.description: Optional. Data to be sent in a callback query to the bot when the button is pressed, 1-64 bytes

properties.name: web_app
properties.description: Optional. Description of the Web App that will be launched when the user presses the button. The Web App will be able to send an arbitrary message on behalf of the user using the method answerWebAppQuery. Available only in private chats between a user and the bot. Not supported for messages sent on behalf of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: login_url
properties.description: Optional. An HTTPS URL used to automatically authorize the user. Can be used as a replacement for the Telegram Login Widget.

properties.name: switch_inline_query
properties.description: Optional. If set, pressing the button will prompt the user to select one of their chats, open that chat and insert the bot's username and the specified inline query in the input field. May be empty, in which case just the bot's username will be inserted. Not supported for messages sent in channel direct messages chats and on behalf of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: switch_inline_query_current_chat
properties.description: Optional. If set, pressing the button will insert the bot's username and the specified inline query in the current chat's input field. May be empty, in which case only the bot's username will be inserted.This offers a quick way for the user to open your bot in inline mode in the same chat - good for selecting something from multiple options. Not supported in channels and for messages sent in channel direct messages chats and on behalf of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: switch_inline_query_chosen_chat
properties.description: Optional. If set, pressing the button will prompt the user to select one of their chats of the specified type, open that chat and insert the bot's username and the specified inline query in the input field. Not supported for messages sent in channel direct messages chats and on behalf of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: copy_text
properties.description: Optional. Description of the button that copies the specified text to the clipboard.

properties.name: callback_game
properties.description: Optional. Description of the game that will be launched when the user presses the button.NOTE: This type of button must always be the first button in the first row.

properties.name: pay
properties.description: Optional. Specify True, to send a Pay button. Substrings “” and “XTR” in the buttons's text will be replaced with a Telegram Star icon.NOTE: This type of button must always be the first button in the first row and can only be used in invoice messages.

name: LoginUrl
description: This object represents a parameter of the inline keyboard button used to automatically authorize a user. Serves as a great replacement for the Telegram Login Widget when the user is coming from Telegram. All the user needs to do is tap/click a button and confirm that they want to log in:Telegram apps support these buttons as of version 5.7.

properties.name: url
properties.description: An HTTPS URL to be opened with user authorization data added to the query string when the button is pressed. If the user refuses to provide authorization data, the original URL without information about the user will be opened. The data added is the same as described in Receiving authorization data.NOTE: You must always check the hash of the received data to verify the authentication and the integrity of the data as described in Checking authorization.

properties.name: forward_text
properties.description: Optional. New text of the button in forwarded messages.

properties.name: bot_username
properties.description: Optional. Username of a bot, which will be used for user authorization. See Setting up a bot for more details. If not specified, the current bot's username will be assumed. The url's domain must be the same as the domain linked with the bot. See Linking your domain to the bot for more details.

properties.name: request_write_access
properties.description: Optional. Pass True to request the permission for your bot to send messages to the user.

name: SwitchInlineQueryChosenChat
description: This object represents an inline button that switches the current user to inline mode in a chosen chat, with an optional default inline query.

properties.name: query
properties.description: Optional. The default inline query to be inserted in the input field. If left empty, only the bot's username will be inserted

properties.name: allow_user_chats
properties.description: Optional. True, if private chats with users can be chosen

properties.name: allow_bot_chats
properties.description: Optional. True, if private chats with bots can be chosen

properties.name: allow_group_chats
properties.description: Optional. True, if group and supergroup chats can be chosen

properties.name: allow_channel_chats
properties.description: Optional. True, if channel chats can be chosen

name: CopyTextButton
description: This object represents an inline keyboard button that copies specified text to the clipboard.

properties.name: text
properties.description: The text to be copied to the clipboard; 1-256 characters

name: CallbackQuery
description: This object represents an incoming callback query from a callback button in an inline keyboard. If the button that originated the query was attached to a message sent by the bot, the field message will be present. If the button was attached to a message sent via the bot (in inline mode), the field inline_message_id will be present. Exactly one of the fields data or game_short_name will be present.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique identifier for this query

properties.name: from
properties.description: Sender

properties.name: chat_instance
properties.description: Global identifier, uniquely corresponding to the chat to which the message with the callback button was sent. Useful for high scores in games.

properties.name: message
properties.description: Optional. Message sent by the bot with the callback button that originated the query

properties.name: inline_message_id
properties.description: Optional. Identifier of the message sent via the bot in inline mode, that originated the query.

properties.name: data
properties.description: Optional. Data associated with the callback button. Be aware that the message originated the query can contain no callback buttons with this data.

properties.name: game_short_name
properties.description: Optional. Short name of a Game to be returned, serves as the unique identifier for the game

name: ForceReply
description: Upon receiving a message with this object, Telegram clients will display a reply interface to the user (act as if the user has selected the bot's message and tapped 'Reply'). This can be extremely useful if you want to create user-friendly step-by-step interfaces without having to sacrifice privacy mode. Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: force_reply
properties.description: Shows reply interface to the user, as if they manually selected the bot's message and tapped 'Reply'

properties.name: input_field_placeholder
properties.description: Optional. The placeholder to be shown in the input field when the reply is active; 1-64 characters

properties.name: selective
properties.description: Optional. Use this parameter if you want to force reply from specific users only. Targets: 1) users that are @mentioned in the text of the Message object; 2) if the bot's message is a reply to a message in the same chat and forum topic, sender of the original message.

name: ChatPhoto
description: This object represents a chat photo.

properties.name: small_file_id
properties.description: File identifier of small (160x160) chat photo. This file_id can be used only for photo download and only for as long as the photo is not changed.

properties.name: small_file_unique_id
properties.description: Unique file identifier of small (160x160) chat photo, which is supposed to be the same over time and for different bots. Can't be used to download or reuse the file.

properties.name: big_file_id
properties.description: File identifier of big (640x640) chat photo. This file_id can be used only for photo download and only for as long as the photo is not changed.

properties.name: big_file_unique_id
properties.description: Unique file identifier of big (640x640) chat photo, which is supposed to be the same over time and for different bots. Can't be used to download or reuse the file.

name: ChatInviteLink
description: Represents an invite link for a chat.

properties.name: invite_link
properties.description: The invite link. If the link was created by another chat administrator, then the second part of the link will be replaced with “…”.

properties.name: creator
properties.description: Creator of the link

properties.name: creates_join_request
properties.description: True, if users joining the chat via the link need to be approved by chat administrators

properties.name: is_primary
properties.description: True, if the link is primary

properties.name: is_revoked
properties.description: True, if the link is revoked

properties.name: name
properties.description: Optional. Invite link name

properties.name: expire_date
properties.description: Optional. Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the link will expire or has been expired

properties.name: member_limit
properties.description: Optional. The maximum number of users that can be members of the chat simultaneously after joining the chat via this invite link; 1-99999

properties.name: pending_join_request_count
properties.description: Optional. Number of pending join requests created using this link

properties.name: subscription_period
properties.description: Optional. The number of seconds the subscription will be active for before the next payment

properties.name: subscription_price
properties.description: Optional. The amount of Telegram Stars a user must pay initially and after each subsequent subscription period to be a member of the chat using the link

name: ChatAdministratorRights
description: Represents the rights of an administrator in a chat.

properties.name: is_anonymous
properties.description: True, if the user's presence in the chat is hidden

properties.name: can_manage_chat
properties.description: True, if the administrator can access the chat event log, get boost list, see hidden supergroup and channel members, report spam messages, ignore slow mode, and send messages to the chat without paying Telegram Stars. Implied by any other administrator privilege.

properties.name: can_delete_messages
properties.description: True, if the administrator can delete messages of other users

properties.name: can_manage_video_chats
properties.description: True, if the administrator can manage video chats

properties.name: can_restrict_members
properties.description: True, if the administrator can restrict, ban or unban chat members, or access supergroup statistics

properties.name: can_promote_members
properties.description: True, if the administrator can add new administrators with a subset of their own privileges or demote administrators that they have promoted, directly or indirectly (promoted by administrators that were appointed by the user)

properties.name: can_change_info
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to change the chat title, photo and other settings

properties.name: can_invite_users
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to invite new users to the chat

properties.name: can_post_stories
properties.description: True, if the administrator can post stories to the chat

properties.name: can_edit_stories
properties.description: True, if the administrator can edit stories posted by other users, post stories to the chat page, pin chat stories, and access the chat's story archive

properties.name: can_delete_stories
properties.description: True, if the administrator can delete stories posted by other users

properties.name: can_post_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can post messages in the channel, approve suggested posts, or access channel statistics; for channels only

properties.name: can_edit_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can edit messages of other users and can pin messages; for channels only

properties.name: can_pin_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to pin messages; for groups and supergroups only

properties.name: can_manage_topics
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to create, rename, close, and reopen forum topics; for supergroups only

properties.name: can_manage_direct_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can manage direct messages of the channel and decline suggested posts; for channels only

properties.name: can_manage_tags
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can edit the tags of regular members; for groups and supergroups only. If omitted defaults to the value of can_pin_messages.

name: ChatMemberUpdated
description: This object represents changes in the status of a chat member.

properties.name: chat
properties.description: Chat the user belongs to

properties.name: from
properties.description: Performer of the action, which resulted in the change

properties.name: date
properties.description: Date the change was done in Unix time

properties.name: old_chat_member
properties.description: Previous information about the chat member

properties.name: new_chat_member
properties.description: New information about the chat member

properties.name: invite_link
properties.description: Optional. Chat invite link, which was used by the user to join the chat; for joining by invite link events only.

properties.name: via_join_request
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user joined the chat after sending a direct join request without using an invite link and being approved by an administrator

properties.name: via_chat_folder_invite_link
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user joined the chat via a chat folder invite link

name: ChatMember
description: This object contains information about one member of a chat. Currently, the following 6 types of chat members are supported:

name: ChatMemberOwner
description: Represents a chat member that owns the chat and has all administrator privileges.

properties.name: status
properties.description: The member's status in the chat, always “creator”

properties.name: user
properties.description: Information about the user

properties.name: is_anonymous
properties.description: True, if the user's presence in the chat is hidden

properties.name: custom_title
properties.description: Optional. Custom title for this user

name: ChatMemberAdministrator
description: Represents a chat member that has some additional privileges.

properties.name: status
properties.description: The member's status in the chat, always “administrator”

properties.name: user
properties.description: Information about the user

properties.name: can_be_edited
properties.description: True, if the bot is allowed to edit administrator privileges of that user

properties.name: is_anonymous
properties.description: True, if the user's presence in the chat is hidden

properties.name: can_manage_chat
properties.description: True, if the administrator can access the chat event log, get boost list, see hidden supergroup and channel members, report spam messages, ignore slow mode, and send messages to the chat without paying Telegram Stars. Implied by any other administrator privilege.

properties.name: can_delete_messages
properties.description: True, if the administrator can delete messages of other users

properties.name: can_manage_video_chats
properties.description: True, if the administrator can manage video chats

properties.name: can_restrict_members
properties.description: True, if the administrator can restrict, ban or unban chat members, or access supergroup statistics

properties.name: can_promote_members
properties.description: True, if the administrator can add new administrators with a subset of their own privileges or demote administrators that they have promoted, directly or indirectly (promoted by administrators that were appointed by the user)

properties.name: can_change_info
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to change the chat title, photo and other settings

properties.name: can_invite_users
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to invite new users to the chat

properties.name: can_post_stories
properties.description: True, if the administrator can post stories to the chat

properties.name: can_edit_stories
properties.description: True, if the administrator can edit stories posted by other users, post stories to the chat page, pin chat stories, and access the chat's story archive

properties.name: can_delete_stories
properties.description: True, if the administrator can delete stories posted by other users

properties.name: can_post_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can post messages in the channel, approve suggested posts, or access channel statistics; for channels only

properties.name: can_edit_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can edit messages of other users and can pin messages; for channels only

properties.name: can_pin_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to pin messages; for groups and supergroups only

properties.name: can_manage_topics
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to create, rename, close, and reopen forum topics; for supergroups only

properties.name: can_manage_direct_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can manage direct messages of the channel and decline suggested posts; for channels only

properties.name: can_manage_tags
properties.description: Optional. True, if the administrator can edit the tags of regular members; for groups and supergroups only. If omitted defaults to the value of can_pin_messages.

properties.name: custom_title
properties.description: Optional. Custom title for this user

name: ChatMemberMember
description: Represents a chat member that has no additional privileges or restrictions.

properties.name: status
properties.description: The member's status in the chat, always “member”

properties.name: user
properties.description: Information about the user

properties.name: tag
properties.description: Optional. Tag of the member

properties.name: until_date
properties.description: Optional. Date when the user's subscription will expire; Unix time

name: ChatMemberRestricted
description: Represents a chat member that is under certain restrictions in the chat. Supergroups only.

properties.name: status
properties.description: The member's status in the chat, always “restricted”

properties.name: user
properties.description: Information about the user

properties.name: is_member
properties.description: True, if the user is a member of the chat at the moment of the request

properties.name: can_send_messages
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send text messages, contacts, giveaways, giveaway winners, invoices, locations and venues

properties.name: can_send_audios
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send audios

properties.name: can_send_documents
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send documents

properties.name: can_send_photos
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send photos

properties.name: can_send_videos
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send videos

properties.name: can_send_video_notes
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send video notes

properties.name: can_send_voice_notes
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send voice notes

properties.name: can_send_polls
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send polls and checklists

properties.name: can_send_other_messages
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to send animations, games, stickers and use inline bots

properties.name: can_add_web_page_previews
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to add web page previews to their messages

properties.name: can_edit_tag
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to edit their own tag

properties.name: can_change_info
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to change the chat title, photo and other settings

properties.name: can_invite_users
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to invite new users to the chat

properties.name: can_pin_messages
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to pin messages

properties.name: can_manage_topics
properties.description: True, if the user is allowed to create forum topics

properties.name: until_date
properties.description: Date when restrictions will be lifted for this user; Unix time. If 0, then the user is restricted forever

properties.name: tag
properties.description: Optional. Tag of the member

name: ChatMemberLeft
description: Represents a chat member that isn't currently a member of the chat, but may join it themselves.

properties.name: status
properties.description: The member's status in the chat, always “left”

properties.name: user
properties.description: Information about the user

name: ChatMemberBanned
description: Represents a chat member that was banned in the chat and can't return to the chat or view chat messages.

properties.name: status
properties.description: The member's status in the chat, always “kicked”

properties.name: user
properties.description: Information about the user

properties.name: until_date
properties.description: Date when restrictions will be lifted for this user; Unix time. If 0, then the user is banned forever

name: ChatJoinRequest
description: Represents a join request sent to a chat.

properties.name: chat
properties.description: Chat to which the request was sent

properties.name: from
properties.description: User that sent the join request

properties.name: user_chat_id
properties.description: Identifier of a private chat with the user who sent the join request. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier. The bot can use this identifier for 5 minutes to send messages until the join request is processed, assuming no other administrator contacted the user.

properties.name: date
properties.description: Date the request was sent in Unix time

properties.name: bio
properties.description: Optional. Bio of the user.

properties.name: invite_link
properties.description: Optional. Chat invite link that was used by the user to send the join request

name: ChatPermissions
description: Describes actions that a non-administrator user is allowed to take in a chat.

properties.name: can_send_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send text messages, contacts, giveaways, giveaway winners, invoices, locations and venues

properties.name: can_send_audios
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send audios

properties.name: can_send_documents
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send documents

properties.name: can_send_photos
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send photos

properties.name: can_send_videos
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send videos

properties.name: can_send_video_notes
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send video notes

properties.name: can_send_voice_notes
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send voice notes

properties.name: can_send_polls
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send polls and checklists

properties.name: can_send_other_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to send animations, games, stickers and use inline bots

properties.name: can_add_web_page_previews
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to add web page previews to their messages

properties.name: can_edit_tag
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to edit their own tag

properties.name: can_change_info
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to change the chat title, photo and other settings. Ignored in public supergroups

properties.name: can_invite_users
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to invite new users to the chat

properties.name: can_pin_messages
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to pin messages. Ignored in public supergroups

properties.name: can_manage_topics
properties.description: Optional. True, if the user is allowed to create forum topics. If omitted defaults to the value of can_pin_messages

name: Birthdate
description: Describes the birthdate of a user.

properties.name: day
properties.description: Day of the user's birth; 1-31

properties.name: month
properties.description: Month of the user's birth; 1-12

properties.name: year
properties.description: Optional. Year of the user's birth

name: BusinessIntro
description: Contains information about the start page settings of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Optional. Title text of the business intro

properties.name: message
properties.description: Optional. Message text of the business intro

properties.name: sticker
properties.description: Optional. Sticker of the business intro

name: BusinessLocation
description: Contains information about the location of a Telegram Business account.

properties.name: address
properties.description: Address of the business

properties.name: location
properties.description: Optional. Location of the business

name: BusinessOpeningHoursInterval
description: Describes an interval of time during which a business is open.

properties.name: opening_minute
properties.description: The minute's sequence number in a week, starting on Monday, marking the start of the time interval during which the business is open; 0 - 7 * 24 * 60

properties.name: closing_minute
properties.description: The minute's sequence number in a week, starting on Monday, marking the end of the time interval during which the business is open; 0 - 8 * 24 * 60

name: BusinessOpeningHours
description: Describes the opening hours of a business.

properties.name: time_zone_name
properties.description: Unique name of the time zone for which the opening hours are defined

properties.name: opening_hours
properties.description: List of time intervals describing business opening hours

name: UserRating
description: This object describes the rating of a user based on their Telegram Star spendings.

properties.name: level
properties.description: Current level of the user, indicating their reliability when purchasing digital goods and services. A higher level suggests a more trustworthy customer; a negative level is likely reason for concern.

properties.name: rating
properties.description: Numerical value of the user's rating; the higher the rating, the better

properties.name: current_level_rating
properties.description: The rating value required to get the current level

properties.name: next_level_rating
properties.description: Optional. The rating value required to get to the next level; omitted if the maximum level was reached

name: StoryAreaPosition
description: Describes the position of a clickable area within a story.

properties.name: x_percentage
properties.description: The abscissa of the area's center, as a percentage of the media width

properties.name: y_percentage
properties.description: The ordinate of the area's center, as a percentage of the media height

properties.name: width_percentage
properties.description: The width of the area's rectangle, as a percentage of the media width

properties.name: height_percentage
properties.description: The height of the area's rectangle, as a percentage of the media height

properties.name: rotation_angle
properties.description: The clockwise rotation angle of the rectangle, in degrees; 0-360

properties.name: corner_radius_percentage
properties.description: The radius of the rectangle corner rounding, as a percentage of the media width

name: LocationAddress
description: Describes the physical address of a location.

properties.name: country_code
properties.description: The two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the country where the location is located

properties.name: state
properties.description: Optional. State of the location

properties.name: city
properties.description: Optional. City of the location

properties.name: street
properties.description: Optional. Street address of the location

name: StoryAreaType
description: Describes the type of a clickable area on a story. Currently, it can be one of

name: StoryAreaTypeLocation
description: Describes a story area pointing to a location. Currently, a story can have up to 10 location areas.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the area, always “location”

properties.name: latitude
properties.description: Location latitude in degrees

properties.name: longitude
properties.description: Location longitude in degrees

properties.name: address
properties.description: Optional. Address of the location

name: StoryAreaTypeSuggestedReaction
description: Describes a story area pointing to a suggested reaction. Currently, a story can have up to 5 suggested reaction areas.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the area, always “suggested_reaction”

properties.name: reaction_type
properties.description: Type of the reaction

properties.name: is_dark
properties.description: Optional. Pass True if the reaction area has a dark background

properties.name: is_flipped
properties.description: Optional. Pass True if reaction area corner is flipped

name: StoryAreaTypeLink
description: Describes a story area pointing to an HTTP or tg:// link. Currently, a story can have up to 3 link areas.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the area, always “link”

properties.name: url
properties.description: HTTP or tg:// URL to be opened when the area is clicked

name: StoryAreaTypeWeather
description: Describes a story area containing weather information. Currently, a story can have up to 3 weather areas.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the area, always “weather”

properties.name: temperature
properties.description: Temperature, in degree Celsius

properties.name: emoji
properties.description: Emoji representing the weather

properties.name: background_color
properties.description: A color of the area background in the ARGB format

name: StoryAreaTypeUniqueGift
description: Describes a story area pointing to a unique gift. Currently, a story can have at most 1 unique gift area.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of the area, always “unique_gift”

properties.name: name
properties.description: Unique name of the gift

name: StoryArea

properties.description: File to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended), pass an HTTP URL for Telegram to get a file from the Internet, or pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files »

properties.description: File to send. More information on Sending Files »

properties.name: thumbnail
properties.description: Optional. Thumbnail of the file sent; can be ignored if thumbnail generation for the file is supported server-side. The thumbnail should be in JPEG format and less than 200 kB in size. A thumbnail's width and height should not exceed 320. Ignored if the file is not uploaded using multipart/form-data. Thumbnails can't be reused and can be only uploaded as a new file, so you can pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” if the thumbnail was uploaded using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name>. More information on Sending Files »

name: getMe
description: A simple method for testing your bot's authentication token. Requires no parameters. Returns basic information about the bot in form of a User object.

name: logOut
description: Use this method to log out from the cloud Bot API server before launching the bot locally. You must log out the bot before running it locally, otherwise there is no guarantee that the bot will receive updates. After a successful call, you can immediately log in on a local server, but will not be able to log in back to the cloud Bot API server for 10 minutes. Returns True on success. Requires no parameters.

name: close
description: Use this method to close the bot instance before moving it from one local server to another. You need to delete the webhook before calling this method to ensure that the bot isn't launched again after server restart. The method will return error 429 in the first 10 minutes after the bot is launched. Returns True on success. Requires no parameters.

properties.name: direct_messages_topic_id
properties.description: Identifier of the direct messages topic to which the message will be sent; required if the message is sent to a direct messages chat

properties.description: Mode for parsing entities in the message text. See formatting options for more details.

properties.description: Sends the message silently. Users will receive a notification with no sound.

properties.name: protect_content
properties.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

properties.name: allow_paid_broadcast
properties.description: Pass True to allow up to 1000 messages per second, ignoring broadcasting limits for a fee of 0.1 Telegram Stars per message. The relevant Stars will be withdrawn from the bot's balance
